inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 operating income $3.44B plus normalized net investment income contribution, divided by ~535M diluted shares (10-K FY2025); bridges GAAP OCF $4.78/sh and operating income $6.44/sh
inputs.normalization_note: FY2025 GAAP net income fell to $3.65B (EPS $6.82) from $5.44B on investment marks; owner cash uses underwriting plus recurring investment spread, not peak 2024 GAAP earnings

bear.notes: Japan persistency pressure, yen headwind, multiple compresses toward mid-teens free cash flow multiple

base.notes: Low-single-digit premium growth in Japan and U.S. worksite channel; investment portfolio supports mid-single-digit owner-cash growth

bull.notes: U.S. supplemental penetration accelerates, Japan third-sector products grow, buybacks continue at premium multiple

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Insurance assets and liabilities marked through investment portfolio; no historical-cost land floor issue

option_scan.question: Investment portfolio spread not in owner-cash path?
option_scan.evidence: Net investment income $4.08B in FY2025 revenues; normalized in starting owner cash per share

option_scan.question: Material separate options after scan?
option_scan.evidence: Supplemental insurance compounder; Lawrence full cash-flow path sufficient

growth_explanation.mechanism: Japan cancer and medical supplemental persistency plus U.S. worksite accident and hospital indemnity sales; owner cash grows with earned premium and net investment income on the $104B portfolio.
growth_explanation.source: 10-K FY2025 segment revenues; Q1 2026 10-Q premium and investment income trends

paths.label: Growth theory (pre-falsifier)
paths.weight_why: Segment blend before falsifier pass; diagnostic only when it differs from falsifier-adjusted.
weight_falsifiers: Included at full weight alongside falsifier-adjusted without divergence note

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

qualitative_adjustments.factor: No dated predictive attribute at spot
qualitative_adjustments.rationale: Scarcity is descriptive; no timed mispricing catalyst in base
qualitative_adjustments.falsifier: Cross-check names dated catalyst with timeline

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative
